eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Todd; Wadena; Stearns; Pope; Otter Tail; Morrison; Douglas; Cass, MN; at 9:29 AM on JUN 18, 2019 Effective until 10:29 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test.  This is the Todd County Required Weekly Test. This is a special test for the following counties: Cass, Wadena, Otter Tail, Douglas, Pope, Stearns and Morrison.
